_description: DM-R-6 baseline. Lists historical single-step enum renames that pre-date the playbook. New violations MUST NOT be added to this file; fix them with the 4-migration pattern instead.
_policy: Append-only is NOT allowed — every entry is a documented historical exception, reviewed in PR.

exempt.reason: Pre-dates DM-R-6 (2026-04-18). This migration IS the empirical basis of the enum-evolution-playbook (caused the 45-min outage). Cannot be rewritten retroactively — already applied in dev+prod. Documented in docs/planning/enum-evolution-playbook.md.
